title: tectaria schultzei
intro: Tectaria schultzei, also known as the Schultze's fern or the Tectaria fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Tectaria schultzei include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Tinctures, teas, and infusions are commonly used herbal preparations of this plant, often made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing the plant material with a solvent to create a concentrated extract.
